query:
WITH target_po AS (
  SELECT CONVERT('PO-A1-NAME-1778504644297' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS po_number UNION ALL
  SELECT CONVERT('PO-A1-NAME-1778504804493' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci UNION ALL
  SELECT CONVERT('PO-A1-RENAME-1778505568173' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci UNION ALL
  SELECT CONVERT('PO-BATCH-BASE-1778504566881' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci UNION ALL
  SELECT CONVERT('PO-BATCH-BASE-1778504806894' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci UNION ALL
  SELECT CONVERT('PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504564630' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci UNION ALL
  SELECT CONVERT('PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504644224' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci UNION ALL
  SELECT CONVERT('PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504711473' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci UNION ALL
  SELECT CONVERT('PO-E-RESTORE-1778505346688' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci UNION ALL
  SELECT CONVERT('PO-E-RESTORE-1778505515012' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci UNION ALL
  SELECT CONVERT('PO-E-RESTORE-1778505677150' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
)
SELECT 
  t.po_number,
  COALESCE(p.product_count, 0) AS product_count,
  COALESCE(d.delete_log_count, 0) AS delete_log_count,
  d.last_deleted_at
FROM target_po t
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT poNumber, COUNT(*) AS product_count
  FROM products
  GROUP BY poNumber
) p ON p.poNumber = t.po_number
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT poNumber, COUNT(*) AS delete_log_count, MAX(createdAt) AS last_deleted_at
  FROM purchase_order_deletion_logs
  GROUP BY poNumber
) d ON d.poNumber = t.po_number
ORDER BY t.po_number;

  SELECT CONVERT('PO-BATCH-BASE-1778504806894' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci UNION ALL
  SELECT CONVERT('PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504564630' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci UNION ALL
  SELECT CONVERT('PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504644224' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci UNION ALL
  SELECT CONVERT('PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504711473' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci UNION ALL
  SELECT CONVERT('PO-E-RESTORE-1778505346688' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci UNION ALL
  SELECT CONVERT('PO-E-RESTORE-1778505515012' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci UNION ALL
  SELECT CONVERT('PO-E-RESTORE-1778505677150' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
)
SELECT 
  t.po_number,
  COALESCE(p.product_count, 0) AS product_count,
  COALESCE(d.delete_log_count, 0) AS delete_log_count,
  d.last_deleted_at
FROM target_po t
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT poNumber, COUNT(*) AS product_count

) p ON p.poNumber = t.po_number
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT poNumber, COUNT(*) AS delete_log_count, MAX(createdAt) AS last_deleted_at
  FROM purchase_order_deletion_logs
  GROUP BY poNumber
) d ON d.poNumber = t.po_number
ORDER BY t.po_number;
